rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in annex agree blocks; use component type annexes for assumptions/guarantees and implementation annexes for bindings.
Ensure AGREE assumptions and guarantees refer to valid component ports in appropriate scopes.
generic_rules: Use assign statements only for existing output features or declared auxiliary variables in implementation scope.
Write guarantees relating visible outputs to visible inputs; avoid implementation-only subcomponent paths in type scope.
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicitly typed ports or constants are available.
Avoid unsafe Boolean or numeric encodings of event ports without model-provided data values.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Implementation-level bindings should appear in implementation scopes after subcomponents and connections.
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope; use type scope for guarantees.
Do not reference AADL property names directly as AGREE variables without explicit typed ports.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
